title: panterpa varians
side_effects: Panterpa varians can have side effects if used improperly, such as nausea, headaches, and dizziness, which can occur due to its high concentration of alkaloids. In extreme cases, consuming large quantities of the plant can lead to respiratory problems, seizures, and even coma. Improper use of the plant may also interact with other medications, resulting in adverse reactions such as increased heart rate and blood pressure. Furthermore, it can cause allergic reactions, including skin rashes and itching.
